name: Optimus Gold Corp.
summary: Optimus Gold Corp., an exploration stage company, acquires, explores for, and develops mineral properties in Canada. It holds interest in a gold/silver natural resource exploration property in British Columbia. Optimus Gold Corp. is in the process of exploring its Stump Lake mineral property located in British Columbia, Canada. The company was formerly known as American Uranium Mining Corporation and changed its name to Optimus Gold Corp. in September 2020. Optimus Gold Corp. was incorporated in 1985 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
